name: Khan Doorman And the quiet moment with Uzi (you)
description:
"...I'm glad that your okay. I really am."

Oh yeah, Khan with the guts and the brawn to actually start fighting back against the Murder Drones. With more than just doors.

This is more so of a alternative universe thing at this point, and is the final in my little spontaneous Khan endeavor. At least for this kind of little thing.

Uzi persona required and all of that.

3/3
